case_title: TD BANK USA. N.A. VS. BLANCA E RAMIREZGARCIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-20-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT AFFIDAVIT OF REASONABLE DILIGENCE. PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL ATTACHED. (TRANSACTION ID # 100127908), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA. N.A. SERVED MAR-07-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE MAR-09-2021 AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZGARCIA, BLANCA E

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA. N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZGARCIA, BLANCA E DOES 1 TO 15 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-20-2020
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-22-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
